name: gbrowse
description: Fast headless and headed browser automation for QA, dogfooding, and scraping from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Drive a real browser from Codex
interface.longDescription: gbrowse gives Codex a real browser for QA, dogfooding, scraping, snapshots, screenshots, tabs, cookies, and headed Chromium sessions with a sidebar terminal.
defaultPrompt: Use gbrowse to inspect this app in a browser.
Take browser screenshots and check the page behavior.
Scrape structured content from a web page.
